abilities.name: Ramming Speed
abilities.text: This model's (melee) actions generated by the Charge action receive +1 Skl and any one suit to its final duel totals.

abilities.name: You Take the Wheel
abilities.text: Once per turn. After this model resolves the Walk action, it may discard a card to declare the Interact action, ignoring engagement. This Interact action may target a marker with enemies in base contact with it.

actions.name: Catch in the Treads
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

actions.name: Flamethrower
actions.effects: Enemy models within 1" of the target gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: All-Terrain Turtle
actions.effects: Move this model 4", ignoring models and terrain. Models moved through this way must each pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 1 damage.
